calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-07-2018 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-03-2017 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-08-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gadi Zohar for (petitioner) Richard Stern.

The Court asked counsel what was still outstanding and asked for a proposed order and courtesy copies. Mr. Zohar stated that they tried to deliver copies on 10/21/16 and submitted courtesy copies today to the court for review. The Court took the petition for probate of will and for letters testamentary under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)
